fields.summary: Support specifying node resources in SLS
Umbrella JIRA of SLS fixes / improvements

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description: At present, all nodes have same resources in SLS. We need to add capability to add different resources to different nodes in SLS.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

Thanks [~abmodi] for the patch.

LGTM +1.

NIT: why do you have only one node in nodes-with-resources?

Thanks [~giovanni.fumarola] for review.

I only kept only one node with explicit resources in nodes-with-resources to verify mix of both nodes-with-resources and nodes without explicit resources.

[^YARN-8134.003.patch] looks good.
The unit test testParseNodesFromNodeFile succesfully run.
+1
Committing to trunk.

Thank you [~abmodi] for the patch and [~giovanni.fumarola] for the review.
Committed to trunk.
